versions.label: 0.12.5 - Lyrian Chronicles
updates: Rules
Added Astra Corruption effects to the rulebook.
Added short animal raising rules
Races
NEW:- Sheepfolk, a chimera subrace with an affinity for aetherie magic.
Classes
NEW:- Necromaster, t3 version of necromancer
Biochemist, a t2 specialist class that copies chimera's.

versions.label: 0.12.6 - Lyrian Chronicles
updates: Rules
You can now escape a battle while grabbed or carried by another creature.
Added the Grab Ally action to the rules.
Classes
NEW:- Sanctioner, a t2 focus based healing class.
Jewel Idol, the t2 cool idol.
Merchant, a t1 utility class that excels in obtaining items. (Procurement works a bit differently in Mirane.)
Mogul, t2 merchant that uses the power of money.

versions.label: 0.13.0 - Lyrian Chronicles
updates: Races
NEW:- Sylph, a wind aligned fae subrace.
Phoenix rebirth now removes all buffs/debuffs.
Slime Body mana cost reduced from 1→0.
Fading Counter mana cost reduced from 1→0.
Blinding Dust now has the circuit keyword.
Faerie Flash II slightly updated to account for abilities potentially resetting Faerie Flash.
Classes
